description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank, featuring a large, dual-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The exterior is covered in a patchwork of tan, brown, and rusted metal panels, with visible weathering and signs of wear, suggesting extensive use in harsh environments. The turret is equipped with a metal railing and various hatches, and the vehicle's hull is reinforced with thick, sloped armor plating on all sides. The tank rides on wide, black caterpillar tracks, providing stability and traction over rough terrain. Additional features include cylindrical components at the rear and side, possibly for storage or exhaust, and a prominent blue muzzle brake on the main gun. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the vehicle's design emphasizes durability and firepower.
description: A weathered, tan and brown armored tank with a dual-barreled main cannon, sloped armor plating, and black caterpillar tracks. The turret features a metal railing and hatches, with visible signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the dual-barreled cannon, sloped armor, and weathered panels with rust and tan coloration.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the cylindrical rear component, turret hatches, and the tank's caterpillar tracks.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the turret's railing, rear cylindrical part, and the patchwork armor panels.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the blue muzzle brake, sloped front armor, and the tank's broad tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One dual-barreled main cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and modular armor panels; visible patchwork of reinforced plating with signs of rust and wear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Patchwork paint scheme with tan, brown, and rust colors in irregular, blocky shapes; no standard camouflage pattern.
